scripts.dev:all: concurrently "cd artifacts/atendimento-dashboard/server && node index.js" "cd artifacts/atendimento-dashboard && npm run dev" --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "blue,green"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
